events.title: POC Improv League
events.description:
The first and only improv league with all Person of Color players in St. Louis!
Three new independent teams will debut for a night of joy, color, comedy, and unity.
We’re in this together <3

events.title: No Edit: The Improvised One Act Play
events.description:
Fancy a night at the theater? Reserve your seat, because this is opening AND closing night.

Who are the actors? Impossible to say. What play will they perform? It doesn’t exist. And what will those actors reveal about their process after final bows? Join Touch Baseball as they lose themselves inside of actors playing characters in an improvised one-act play!

events.title: Loose Ends
events.description: Three Teams. Three solo improvisers. One night only. Each team has been paired with a solo performer and given one week to stitch together something brand new. What happens when familiar ensembles are thrown into a brand new blend? Come see three never-before seen teams – built from scratch and performed live for the first (and only) time!

events.title: 80085 4 U
events.description:
To everyone who puts in a hard day’s work, this show is for you. To everyone who relishes in the bizarre, this show is for you.

No intermission (probably), no nudes (yet), lots of confessions (maybe even from you), one team (unless there are more). Come on out and get something off your chest. We’ll get something off ours, too.

Whether you’ve got em, want em, or haven’t thought about em, this 80085 for you.

events.title: Teams Level 2 Student Showcase
events.description:
Join our Teams Level 2 students as they showcase their talents every Monday at 7pm in mainstage!

This is a free event!

events.title: Teams Level 1 Student Showcase
events.description:
Join our Teams Level 1 students every Monday at 7pm on sidestage as they showcase their talents over the 8-weeks of their class.

This is a free event!

events.title: The Gift
events.description:
What’s in the box?! Three improv teams take turns gifting each other unusual physical objects. Whatever they receive, no matter how weird, must inspire their entire performance. Come see what strange ideas they unwrap!

This week’s teams:
Empress, 3rd Wheel, The Odd Throuple

This is a free event!

events.title: House Team Night & Jam
events.description:
Three Improv Shop House Teams take the stage! Each week you’ll see different styles and flavors of longform improv, all in a nice little three set package. Stick around afterwards for The Jam for your opportunity to play along, or just sit back and watch!

This week’s teams:
Long Pigs, Bombadil, Lover Boy

events.title: The Menagerie
events.description: Come one! Come all! and catch three local improv teams as they perform in front of a live audience. Just like a zoo!…except there’s no cages or fish tanks.

events.title: The Merry-Go-Round
events.description:
Step right up for The Merry-Go-Round, an improv extravaganza! Four local improv teams go round and round and take you on a ride of unscripted fun. Don’t miss the show where anything can happen—except boredom!

This is a free event!
